ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-275696 WITH CASE CGC-08-274930 / ORDER CONSOLIDATING ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220,PLAINTIFF HOWARD MCCOY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CASES NUMBERED 274930 AND 275696 ARE CONSOLIDATED. HENCEFORTH ALL PAPERS SHALL BE FILED UNDER THE LEAD CASE NO. 274930. ONE ORDER FOR BOTH CASES WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077. (220)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-15-2010 TO DEPT 206 ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON AUG-19-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT ORDERED THE WEDNESDAY'S ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO THE FOLLOWING DAY SO THAT IT WILL BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS BRAYTON'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. THE COURT CONFER WITH COUNSEL RE TIMELINES FOR DEMAND EXCHANGE. A HEARING IS SET FOR 5/13/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 206 FOR COMMENTS. RESPONSES ARE DUE BY 5/7/10 AND MAY BE FILED UNDER THE COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION, CASE #828684. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK (206) COURT REPORTER KIM RICHARDSON, CSR #5915, IS PRESENT FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE'S COUNSEL, BERRY & BERRY.

RULING:
PLAINTIFF HOWARD MCCOY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's motion for order to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 274930 and 275696 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 274930. One order for both cases was signed in open court.
